---
title: Projects
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
---

A selection of my data science, R projects, and creative work.

## 💻 Fun R Things

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

render_card <- function(title, desc, links=NULL) {

  link_nodes <- list()

  if (!is.null(links)) {
    for (nm in names(links)) {
      url <- links[[nm]]
      link_nodes <- c(
        link_nodes,
        tags$a(nm, href = url, target = "_blank")
      )
    }
  }

  tags$div(
    class = "card",
    tags$h3(title),
    tags$p(desc),
    tags$div(class = "links", link_nodes)
  )
}

fun <- yaml::read_yaml("data/fun_r.yml")

fun_cards <- lapply(fun, function(f) {
  render_card(f$title, f$description, f$links)
})

tags$div(class = "card-grid", fun_cards)
```


## 🎨 Stats Comics

<div class="card-grid">
</div>

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

comics <- yaml::read_yaml("data/comics.yml")

comic_cards <- lapply(comics, function(c) {
  tags$div(
    class = "card",
    tags$h3(c$title),
    tags$img(src = c$file, class = "comic-thumb"),
    tags$p(c$caption)
  )
})

tags$div(class = "card-grid", comic_cards)
```


## ✍🏽 Microblogs

<div class="card-grid">
</div>

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

library(yaml)
library(htmltools)

blogs <- yaml::read_yaml("data/microblogs.yml")

blog_cards <- lapply(blogs, function(b) {
  render_card(
    b$title,
    b$description,
    list("Read more" = b$link$post)
  )
})

tags$div(class = "card-grid", blog_cards)

```
